name: Nimble Streamer
description: Nimble Streamer — lightweight freeware streaming server by Softvelum

seo.title: Nimble Streamer — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Nimble Streamer: Nimble Streamer — lightweight freeware streaming server by Softvelum

when_to_use: Lightweight streaming server with HLS/DASH and low memory use
Self-hosted free streaming solution for small broadcasters
Multi-protocol delivery: HLS, WebRTC, RTMP in one server
Live and VOD streaming without per-stream licensing costs
Video origin server for CDN integration in streaming setups

pros: Very lightweight, runs on small VMs
Supports SRT, RTMP, HLS, MPEG-DASH, LL-HLS
cons: UI dated compared to modern SaaS
review.verdict: Quiet workhorse for self-hosted streaming — free, fast, feature-rich, but not truly open source.
review.best_for: Ops teams running cost-constrained, self-hosted streaming infra on minimal hardware.
review.not_for: Teams needing open source or modern APIs.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
